gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) = '1937' AND T2.`T-CHO` >= 250
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1937'
  AND l."T-CHO" >= 250;
question: List all patients who were born in 1937 whose total cholesterol was beyond the normal range.
